name: auvik-mcp
description: Query and manage Auvik network monitoring data — tenants, devices, networks, alerts, configs, stats, and billing — for MSP AI agents.
long_description: Use this server when you need to inspect or act on Auvik network monitoring data. Covers multi-tenant workflows: list/get tenants, enumerate devices (with type/vendor/status filters), browse discovered networks and interfaces, retrieve stored device configurations, fetch device/interface/service performance statistics over a time range, manage alerts (list, get, dismiss), read entity notes and audit logs, and pull billing usage. Ideal for MSP automation agents that need real-time network visibility across multiple client tenants.

auvik_username.title: Auvik Username
auvik_username.description: Your Auvik API username (often an email address used for API access)

auvik_region.title: Auvik Region (optional)
auvik_region.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default (us1 → https://auvikapi.us1.my.auvik.com). Valid values: us1, us2, us3, us4, eu1, eu2, au1, ca1. Only set for non-US1 tenants.
